title: Field Health Worker
description: Assist in home visits and palliative care for terminally ill patients in rural areas.

title: Child Education Volunteer
description: Teach primary school subjects and mentor children aged 6–14 at the orphanage.

title: Medical Camp Coordinator
description: Coordinate monthly free medical camps for low-income communities.

title: Food Distribution Driver
description: Drive and distribute meals to homeless individuals and daily wage workers.

title: Women Counsellor
description: Provide emotional support and counselling to women survivors of domestic abuse.

title: Tree Planting Drive Organiser
description: Organise and lead tree planting events with local schools on Earth Day.

title: Elderly Companion Visitor
description: Make weekly visits to elderly residents in old-age homes to provide companionship.
